case_title: YALE HUANG VS. WILBER LYNN BROWN ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-19-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, WILBER LYNN ( DRIVER OF VEHICLE)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF YALE HUANG ASSISTED WITH CANTONESE BY NON-CERTIFIED INTERPRETER GUANG HUANG. DEFENDANT WILBER LYNN BROWN DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORP DID NOT APPEAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON WILBER LYNN BROWN. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE DEFENDANT WILBER LYNN BROWN AND PROCEEDS WITH CASE AGAINST TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION. MR. GUANG HUANG WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY CLERK: R.SAHATJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, YALE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, WILBER LYNN ( DRIVER OF VEHICLE)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, YALE AS TO DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION (OWNER OF VEHICLE)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY HUANG, YALE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, WILBER LYNN ( DRIVER OF VEHICLE) TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION (OWNER OF VEHICLE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO DEFENDANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, YALE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION (OWNER OF VEHICLE) $2,574.98 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,639.98, DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - STAMPED SIGNED SERVED DEC-24-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION (OWNER OF VEHICLE)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
